name: plugin lifecycle: /uninstall-cleanup emits one audit log entry per removed category {event:category-removed, category, file_count, bytes_removed}
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && touch .claude-tdd-pro/cache/x && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category cache --confirm yes --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && grep "category-removed" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && grep "cache" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
